name: Shoebox Transportation
districts_or_customers: Private schools and field-trip clients in Pasadena/San Gabriel Valley area; not a public district contract holder per available info
recent_news: No M&A or notable news found; small Pasadena-based operator founded 2004 per company website/Facebook.
fit_notes: Very small private-school/charter operator in LA County. Below typical Summit tuck-in threshold; possible micro-bolt-on for LA-area density only if a Southern California platform is being assembled.

name: Trico Bus Ctr LLC
districts_or_customers: None identified; address (3100 Pullman St, Costa Mesa) is a Trico Realty industrial park hosting 20+ registered entities, suggesting this is a registered-agent/mailbox address rather than a real bus yard
recent_news: No web footprint, no FMCSA carrier match for 'Trico Bus Center' as a school-bus operator; possibly defunct or non-operating shell.
fit_notes: Likely not a real operating school-bus contractor at this address (Trico Realty industrial park hosts many unrelated LLCs). De-prioritize; confirm DMV/CHP SB Term-2 cert before any outreach.

name: Peterman Stsa LLC
owner_or_parent: Summit School Services (Petermann Bus brand; owned by I Squared Capital, formerly National Express LLC / NEXS)
districts_or_customers: Operates Kansas City metro school-bus contracts (Overland Park yard at 7321 W 135th St); part of Petermann's Great Lakes/Midwest network
recent_news: April 2025: I Squared Capital acquired National Express School (NEXS) - including Petermann, Durham, and Stock Transportation - rebranded as Summit School Services. Mailing address 2601 Navistar Dr, Lisle, IL = Summit/NEXS HQ.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET - this IS the Summit platform (Petermann brand subsidiary of Summit School Services / I Squared Capital). Exclude from tuck-in pipeline.
